guide.title: Delivery Guide
guide.summary: Use these checkpoints to read the dashboard without learning every panel first.

evidence.body: Check implementation, test, review, and convergence records before delivery.

newIssue.title: New Loops Issue

workbench.subtitle: Describe the delivery intent once; Dofe turns it into a reviewable issue, spec path, gates, and evidence plan.

newIssue.error: Failed to create issue. Please try again.

simple.commandTitle: Command Dofe with a delivery request
simple.intro: Describe what you want the agents to do. Title, priority and acceptance criteria are generated for you.
simple.requestLabel: What do you want the agents to do?
simple.requestPlaceholder: e.g. Add a Docker fallback for the Codex runtime and show diagnostics in the console
simple.requestHint: At least 10 characters. Keep it to one sentence; expand details in the issue after creation.
simple.requestError: Please describe the request in at least 10 characters.
simple.workspaceRequired: Select or configure a workspace before submitting.
simple.submitRequestBlocked: Add {count} more characters to create an issue.
simple.submitWorkspaceBlocked: A workspace is required before this issue can be created.
simple.submitReady: Ready to create. The generated issue can be reviewed before the loop continues.

readiness.title: Create readiness
readiness.tenantPending: Tenant: not provided — issue will use workspace scope

simple.previewEmpty: Start typing to preview the generated issue.
simple.hardGateHint: Hard gate — stops delivery if not met

testPolicy.integration: client boundary tests + failure-path smoke check

simple.advancedCriteriaPlaceholder: One criterion per line (overrides the generated draft)

feature.label: Feature Loop
feature.description: Plan and deliver a user-facing capability with evidence across UX, API, and tests.
feature.bestFor: New product workflows or visible user value
feature.body:
Background:
-

User goal:
-

Scope:
-

Out of scope:
-
criteria: Primary happy path is implemented end to end
User-facing states cover loading, empty, success, and error outcomes
Backend/API contract is validated with tests when data changes are involved
Regression tests pass and implementation evidence is recorded

bugfix.label: Bugfix Loop
bugfix.description: Capture reproduction, isolate root cause, and require regression coverage.
bugfix.body:
Observed behavior:
-

Expected behavior:
-

Reproduction steps:
1.
2.
3.

Impact:
-
criteria: Root cause is identified and described in the implementation evidence
The reproduction path now passes
A regression test covers the fixed behavior
No unrelated behavior is changed

refactor.label: Refactor Loop
refactor.description: Change internals while protecting public behavior and contracts.
refactor.bestFor: Complexity reduction without product behavior changes
refactor.body:
Current pain:
-

Refactor target:
-

Behavior that must stay unchanged:
-

Risk areas:
-
criteria: External behavior and public contracts remain compatible
Duplication or complexity is reduced in the target area
Existing tests pass and focused coverage is added for touched shared behavior
No unrelated formatting or metadata churn is introduced

docs.label: Docs Loop
docs.description: Update product, architecture, or implementation docs with explicit status labels.
docs.body:
Audience:
-

Documentation goal:
-

Source of truth:
-

Pages or files to update:
-
criteria: Documentation matches the current implementation
Status labels clearly distinguish done, accepted, planned, and blocked work
Commands or examples are accurate and runnable where applicable
Any deferred work includes the reason and required next input

integration.label: Integration Loop
integration.description: Define external system boundaries, credentials, failure handling, and evidence.
integration.bestFor: Git provider, Feishu, worker, or third-party API work
integration.body:
External system:
-

Trigger or data flow:
-

Credentials or environment needed:
-

Failure handling:
-
criteria: Integration client boundary is isolated from service logic
Missing credentials or external failures degrade safely
Success and failure paths are covered by tests or documented smoke checks
Operational logs avoid raw sensitive values

flow.label: Flow Loop
flow.description: Model a stateful agent workflow with triggers, HITL gates, resume, and tracing.
flow.bestFor: CrewAI-style Flow, approval, or recovery workflows
flow.body:
Trigger:
-

State transitions:
-

Human-in-the-loop gate:
-

Resume point:
-

Observability:
-
criteria: Trigger conditions and input payload are explicitly defined
State transitions include success, failure, pause, and resume paths
Human approval or takeover gate is visible before irreversible work
Resume point and recovery behavior are documented with evidence
Trace, notification, and regression evidence are recorded for the flow

handoff.title: Agent Handoff Timeline
handoff.blocked: Handoff is blocked. Resolve the exception before the next persona takes over.
handoff.noCurrent: No active persona — the loop is finalized or waiting to start.

deliveryEvidence.title: Delivery Evidence
deliveryEvidence.summary: PR-ready evidence summary generated from this loop's spec, work, tests, reviews, and cost.
deliveryEvidence.noConvergencePr: No convergence PR yet — finalize the loop to publish evidence.

actions.reviewEvidence: Review failure evidence and start a re-loop
actions.monitorBudget: Monitor budget and shorten scope if guardrails trip

resume.label: Resume loop
resume.body: This issue is paused. Resume it before running more agent steps.

generateSpec.label: Generate spec
generateSpec.body: Create or refresh the product spec before decomposition.

reviewSpec.label: Review spec
reviewSpec.body: Approve, request changes, or reject the draft spec.

decompose.label: Plan the work
decompose.body: Split the approved spec into self-contained implementation shards.

globalReview.label: Final review
globalReview.body: Run the cross-shard review before final annotation and delivery.

reloop.label: Start re-loop
reloop.body: Global review found remaining work. Create the next spec revision.

finalize.label: Finish delivery
finalize.body: Close the issue and make the delivery evidence available for audit.

closed.label: Closed
closed.body: Delivery is finalized. Review the records below for audit evidence.

runStep.label: Continue loop
runStep.body: Advance the next runnable shard through implementation, tests, and review.

runDiagnostics.paused: The loop is paused. Resume it before continuing.
runDiagnostics.spec: An approved spec is required before the scheduler can run.
runDiagnostics.shards: The approved spec is ready to be planned. Continue Loop will create the work plan.
runDiagnostics.complete: All work units are complete. Continue Loop will run the final review or finish delivery.
runDiagnostics.recovering: {shard} is interrupted or already in progress. Continue Loop will recover it and continue automatically.
runDiagnostics.reviewSpec: The only required human gate is the spec review. Approve it or request changes in the spec section.
runDiagnostics.reloop: Global review found remaining work. Use the re-loop panel to create the next spec revision.
runDiagnostics.dependencies: The next TODO shard is waiting for its dependency to finish.
runDiagnostics.none: There is no work the engine can advance right now — a dependency is likely still in progress.

items.readSpec: Read the generated spec and acceptance criteria.
items.decide: Approve or request changes before agents continue.
items.resume: Continue Loop resumes automation after approval.

reloop.title: Re-loop
reloop.body: Global verdict is {verdict}. Create the next spec revision and send it back through human review.

specReview.title: Spec Review
specReview.empty: No spec yet. Use Continue Loop to generate the draft for review.
specReview.revisionNote: Revision requested. Use Continue Loop to produce the next draft for review.
specReview.approvedNote: Spec approved. The engine is continuing automatically — no further action is needed here.

queued.title: Queued for automation
queued.body: The loop engine will pick this shard when its dependencies are ready.

implement.title: Ready for implementation
implement.body: Implementation, test execution, and shard review are handled by the automated loop.

testing.title: Automation in progress
testing.body: The engine is collecting implementation, test, and review evidence for this shard.

done.title: Shard complete
done.body: Required implementation, test, and review evidence has been recorded.

attention.title: Needs automated recovery
attention.body: Continue Loop will recover interrupted work or re-enter the shard loop where possible.

records.currentRoundSummary: Showing round {round} evidence. {hidden} historical records hidden.
records.currentRoundArtifactsSummary: Showing round {round} artifacts. {hidden} historical artifacts hidden.

fallback.rawSummary: Original request payload captured for audit.

hints.shards: Continue Loop to create the work plan
hints.testMatrix: Continue Loop to prepare test coverage
hints.globalReview: Continue Loop to run the final review
